# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, ALB)

Parameters:
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Description: A unique name for the project.
    Default: MyWebApp
  
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16

  PublicSubnet1CidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1.
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24

  PublicSubnet2CidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2.
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24

  PrivateSubnet1CidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 1.
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24

  PrivateSubnet2CidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 2.
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24

  EC2InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Description: EC2 instance type for the application servers.
    Default: t3.micro

  EC2AMIId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI ID for the EC2 instances.
    Default: ami-053b0d53c279acc90 # Amazon Linux 2 AMI (HVM) - current generation

  EC2KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access.

  RDSInstanceType:
    Type: String
    Description: RDS DB instance type.
    Default: db.t3.micro

  RDSAllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Description: Allocated storage for the RDS DB instance (GB).
    Default: 20

  RDSDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the database to create.
    Default: mydatabase

  RDSUsername:
    Type: String
    Description: Username for the RDS DB instance.
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 16
    AllowedPattern: "[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*"
    Default: admin

  RDSPassword:
    Type: String
    Description: Password for the RDS DB instance.
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 41
    NoEcho: true

Resources:
  # VPC and Networking
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-IGW"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1CidrBlock
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs '' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2CidrBlock
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs '' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet2"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CidrBlock
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs '' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CidrBlock
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs '' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet2"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PublicRT"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatGatewayEIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-NatGW-EIP1"

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGatewayEIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-NatGW1"

  NatGatewayEIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-NatGW-EIP2"

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGatewayEIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-NatGW2"

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PrivateRT1"

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-PrivateRT2"

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  # Security Groups
  AlbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub "${ProjectName}-ALB-SG"
      GroupDescription: Security group for ALB, allowing HTTP/S from anywhere.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-ALB-SG"

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub "${ProjectName}-EC2-SG"
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances, allowing HTTP from ALB and SSH from anywhere.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt AlbSecurityGroup.GroupId
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0 # Restrict this in production
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-EC2-SG"

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub "${ProjectName}-RDS-SG"
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS DB instance, allowing access from EC2 instances.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306 # Default MySQL/Aurora port
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-RDS-SG"

  # EC2 Instances (Auto Scaling Group)
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore # For SSM access
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-EC2-Role"

  LaunchConfiguration:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref EC2AMIId
      InstanceType: !Ref EC2InstanceType
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
      KeyName: !Ref EC2KeyPairName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          echo "<h1>Hello from EC2 in ${ProjectName}!</h1>" > /var/www/html/index.html
          # Add more complex application setup here, e.g., connecting to RDS, S3, etc.

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VpcZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      LaunchConfigurationName: !Ref LaunchConfiguration
      MinSize: '2'
      MaxSize: '4'
      DesiredCapacity: '2'
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref AlbTargetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-EC2-ASG"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # Load Balancer (ALB)
  ApplicationLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt AlbSecurityGroup.GroupId
      Type: application
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-ALB"

  AlbTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      TargetType: instance
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-TG"

  AlbListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref AlbTargetGroup

  # RDS Database
  RDSDBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS instance
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-RDS-SubnetGroup"

  RDSDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref RDSInstanceType
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref RDSAllocatedStorage
      DBName: !Ref RDSDatabaseName
      MasterUsername: !Ref RDSUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref RDSPassword
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSSecurityGroup.GroupId
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSDBSubnetGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: true # For high availability
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-RDS-DB"

  # S3 Bucket
  ApplicationS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${ProjectName}-app-data-${AWS::AccountId}" # S3 bucket names must be globally unique
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ProjectName}-S3-Bucket"

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: The ID of Public Subnet 1
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: The ID of Private Subnet 1
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  ApplicationLoadBalancerDNSName:
    Description: The DNS name of the Application Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt ApplicationLoadBalancer.DNSName

  RDSDBEndpointAddress:
    Description: The endpoint address of the RDS DB instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSDBInstance.Endpoint.Address

  RDSDBEndpointPort:
    Description: The endpoint port of the RDS DB instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSDBInstance.Endpoint.Port

  ApplicationS3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref ApplicationS3Bucket
